name: thinktank
description: Structured multi-perspective deliberation for ambiguous problems, competing priorities, and consequential trade-offs.

interface.shortDescription: Explore ambiguous problems through structured perspectives
interface.longDescription: Think Tank helps an orchestrating agent frame ambiguous problems, convene complementary subagent perspectives, preserve dissent, test assumptions, and synthesize coherent solution sets without mistaking consensus for evidence.
defaultPrompt: Use a think tank to explore this problem from genuinely different perspectives.
Convene a standard-depth council and map the strongest solution sets.
